title: The Angel That Presided O'er My Birth
content:
The Angel that presided o'er my birth
    Said, "Little creature, form'd of Joy and Mirth,
    "Go love without the help of any Thing on Earth."
meaning:
This evocative piece by William Blake, titled "The Angel That Presided O'er My Birth", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
